calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Vacated

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Jun-01-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey Schilling, of Bremer Whyte Brown & O'Meara LLP, Tel. (510) 540-4881, for defendants;
No appearance by plaintiffs.

Defendant's counsel stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

RULING: The matter is discussed. PLAINTIFF JULIUS CASAS' MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS is denied without prejudice. Defense counsel shall prepare a proposed order.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Set For Trial On Mar-04-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
